welcomeBanner.title: Welcome to SITES.BD
welcomeBanner.subtitle: Claim a free subdomain on sites.bd, esite.top, or esite.in and point it anywhere you like — all from one dashboard.

connectionGuide.title: Connect your domain
connectionGuide.intro: Already own a domain elsewhere? Point it at SITES.BD in a couple of steps.

steps.title: Search & claim
steps.body: Use the domain search to register a free SITES.BD subdomain, or skip to step 2 with one you already own.

steps.title: Choose how to connect
steps.body: Switch your domain to our system nameservers, or keep your current DNS provider and add a CNAME / A record.

steps.title: Verify
steps.body: We watch for the DNS change and mark the domain Verified automatically — usually within minutes.

connectionGuide.tip: Most setups finish in under 10 minutes. SSL is provisioned automatically once verification completes.

faq.a: Yes — SITES.BD subdomains under sites.bd, esite.top, and esite.in are free for personal and small-business use. There are no hidden renewal fees.

faq.q: How long does DNS verification take?
faq.a: Once you update your DNS, we re-check every few minutes. Most domains verify within 5–10 minutes, but propagation can occasionally take up to an hour.

faq.q: Can I use my own nameservers?
faq.a: Yes. Pick "Manual DNS" when you claim the domain and add the CNAME or A records we generate. You stay in control of your DNS provider.
Free SSL is provisioned automatically through Cloudflare as soon as your domain is verified. There is nothing to install or renew.

faq.q: How do hosting orders get fulfilled?
faq.a: After checkout you'll see your invoice and order under Invoices and Services. We provision hosting manually within a few hours and post credentials to the ticket attached to the order.

faq.q: Who do I contact if something breaks?
faq.a: Open a support ticket from the Tickets page or message us on WhatsApp from any service detail screen. We answer the same day, every day.

terms.claimModalSubtitle: Please review the Terms and Conditions and Domain Usage Policy below. Scroll to the bottom and tick "I Accept" to add this domain to your cart.
terms.acceptCheckboxLabel: I have read and accept the Terms and Conditions and the Domain Usage Policy.
terms.scrollHint: Scroll to the bottom to enable the accept checkbox.
terms.termsAndConditions:
## Terms and Conditions

**Last updated: 2026.**

These Terms and Conditions ("Terms") govern your use of the free subdomains and related services (the "Service") provided by SITES.BD ("we", "us", "our"). By claiming a subdomain you (the "User") agree to be bound by these Terms, the Domain Usage Policy below, and our Privacy Policy.

1. **Eligibility.** You must be at least 13 years old and have the legal capacity to enter into a binding agreement. Subdomains are provided for personal, educational, non-profit, and small-business use; bulk reselling is prohibited without prior written consent.

2. **Account.** A verified SITES.BD account is required for every claim. You are responsible for keeping your credentials confidential and for every action taken under your account. Notify us immediately if you suspect unauthorized access.

3. **Ownership.** Subdomains under sites.bd, esite.top, esite.in and any other TLDs we operate remain the property of SITES.BD. Claiming a subdomain grants you a non-exclusive, revocable, non-transferable licence to use it for the duration of the active claim.

4. **Free of charge.** SITES.BD subdomains are offered free of charge. We reserve the right to introduce paid tiers, premium names, or hosting add-ons in the future; existing free claims will be honoured under the terms in force at the time they were granted.

5. **Term and renewal.** Claims are valid for an initial term of twelve (12) months from activation and renew automatically as long as the subdomain remains in active use, the account is in good standing, and all DNS records resolve to a working website. We may reclaim subdomains that resolve to a parked / empty page for more than ninety (90) consecutive days.

6. **DNS and content responsibility.** You are solely responsible for the DNS records you point at the subdomain and for the content served from it. SITES.BD does not host, mirror, or cache user content; we simply provide DNS authority for the parent zone.

7. **Prohibited use.** You agree not to use the Service for any of the activities listed in the Domain Usage Policy, including phishing, malware distribution, copyright infringement, hate speech, or activity that violates applicable law.

8. **Suspension and termination.** We may suspend or terminate any claim, with or without notice, if we believe in good faith that you have violated these Terms or the Domain Usage Policy, or if a competent authority directs us to do so. Suspended claims will be released back into the public pool after a fourteen (14) day grace period unless the violation is resolved.

9. **No warranty.** The Service is provided "as is". We do not warrant that the Service will be uninterrupted, error-free, or fit for any particular purpose. Scheduled maintenance and DNS propagation delays are normal operating conditions.

10. **Limitation of liability.** To the maximum extent permitted by law, SITES.BD's total liability arising out of or relating to the Service is limited to the fees you paid us (which, for free claims, is zero). We are not liable for indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages, including lost profits, data, or goodwill.

11. **Indemnity.** You agree to indemnify and hold harmless SITES.BD, its officers, employees, and partners from any claim, loss, or expense arising out of your use of the Service, the content you serve through it, or your violation of these Terms.

12. **Changes.** We may update these Terms from time to time. Material changes will be announced at least fourteen (14) days before they take effect, via dashboard banner and email. Continued use of the Service after the effective date constitutes acceptance.

13. **Governing law.** These Terms are governed by the laws of the People's Republic of Bangladesh. Disputes will be brought before the courts of Dhaka, except where consumer-protection law provides for the courts of your habitual residence.

14. **Contact.** Questions about these Terms can be sent to legal@sites.bd or via the in-dashboard ticket system.
terms.domainUsagePolicy:
## Domain Usage Policy

This Domain Usage Policy ("Policy") supplements the Terms and Conditions and describes what you may and may not do with a SITES.BD subdomain. The Policy applies to every subdomain claimed under sites.bd, esite.top, esite.in, and any other TLD operated by SITES.BD.

**Acceptable use.** SITES.BD subdomains may be used to host:

- Personal websites, portfolios, blogs, and CVs.
- Project, hackathon, open-source, and student documentation sites.
- Small-business or freelance marketing pages.
- Non-profit and community organisation websites.
- Webhook endpoints, API gateways, and other technical services, provided traffic stays within fair-use limits.

**Prohibited content and conduct.** The following are strictly forbidden and will result in immediate suspension without prior notice:

1. **Phishing, fraud, and impersonation.** Cloning the visual identity of a bank, government service, well-known brand, or public figure to harvest credentials, payment data, OTPs, or personal information.

2. **Malware, exploit kits, drive-by downloads.** Hosting, linking to, or staging executables, scripts, or browser exploits intended to compromise visitors' devices, browsers, or accounts.

3. **Command-and-control and botnet infrastructure.** Operating C2 endpoints, bulletproof hosting, fast-flux networks, anonymous proxies, or any service whose primary purpose is to facilitate cybercrime.

4. **Copyright and IP infringement.** Distributing pirated software, movies, music, e-books, courses, or any copyrighted material you do not have the right to publish. Repeat-infringer claims may be terminated outright.

5. **Child sexual abuse material (CSAM).** Possession, distribution, or facilitation of CSAM is strictly prohibited and will be reported to the National Centre for Missing & Exploited Children (NCMEC) and the appropriate Bangladeshi authorities.

6. **Hate speech, incitement, and harassment.** Content that promotes violence against, or the dehumanisation of, any individual or group based on race, ethnicity, religion, gender, sexual orientation, disability, or national origin.

7. **Illegal commerce.** Sale of controlled substances, weapons, counterfeit goods, stolen credentials or accounts, fraud-as-a-service offerings, or any product/service prohibited by Bangladeshi law.

8. **Spam and bulk unsolicited messaging.** Operating an open mail relay, sending bulk unsolicited email, SMS, or messaging, or providing infrastructure (link shorteners, mailing lists) primarily used for unsolicited bulk distribution.

9. **Resource abuse.** Running activities that materially degrade shared infrastructure, including cryptocurrency mining via visitor browsers, abusive crawling of upstream services, or denial-of-service amplification.

10. **Domain squatting and trademark abuse.** Registering names that are identical or confusingly similar to a third-party trademark with the intent to mislead users, divert traffic, or extract a sale.

11. **High-risk content gates.** Adult content, gambling, and unregulated financial services are not permitted on free SITES.BD subdomains. These categories may be allowed on paid tiers in the future, subject to age-verification and licensing requirements.

**Reporting abuse.** Anyone can report a suspected violation by emailing abuse@sites.bd with the offending URL, a brief description, and (where relevant) screenshots or headers. We aim to acknowledge reports within 24 hours and investigate within 72 hours.

**Enforcement.** Enforcement actions range from a written warning to immediate suspension, depending on severity, frequency, and the user's history. Suspended domains enter a fourteen (14) day grace period during which the registrant can appeal; unresolved violations release the name back into the public pool. We cooperate with law enforcement requests that meet the requirements of Bangladeshi law and applicable mutual-legal-assistance treaties.

**Right to amend.** We may update this Policy from time to time. Material changes will be announced at least fourteen (14) days before they take effect. By keeping an active claim you agree to abide by the most recent version of this Policy.
